subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! The rose, hyacinth and narcissus must needs possess a sweet fragrance and captivating scent, even as the perfumed breath of the flower [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا گل و سنبل و ضیمرانرا بوی خوشی و رائحه دلکشی لازم نفحه معطره گل
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance
